_note: AWS Infrastructure-as-Code MCP server (awslabs.aws-iac-mcp-server): CloudFormation/CDK validation, cfn-guard compliance checks, and deployment troubleshooting. Runs via uvx (requires the uv package manager and Python 3.10+). Set AWS_PROFILE/AWS_REGION in your shell or .envrc; credentials resolve through the standard AWS chain. The deprecated awslabs.terraform-mcp-server is intentionally NOT included — HashiCorp's official Terraform MCP server has superseded it.
